title: *GOV* Service Delivery Manager | EUC
description:
*GOV* Service Delivery Manager| EUC

  • Working arrangement: Hybrid working arrangements
  • Working location: Central
  • Salary Package: Up to $9,000 + AWS

Join our dynamic team and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of enterprise-level end-user computing services. You'll have the opportunity to lead innovative initiatives, drive standardization across desktop services, and enhance user satisfaction within a supportive and collaborative work environment.

Job Responsibilities

  • Provide essential enterprise-level end-user computing services, ensuring high availability and reliability.
  • Plan and execute new initiatives and enhancements that leverage innovative endpoint technologies to drive organizational efficiency and user satisfaction.
  • Collaborate with team leaders and outsourced service providers to plan, manage, and deliver projects aimed at maintaining, enhancing, or developing new desktop services.
  • Lead projects to standardize desktop services across the organization, reducing operational overhead and improving service delivery and user satisfaction.
  • Supervise and maintain desktop services, ensuring alignment with organizational standards and service level agreements with outsourced providers.

Requirements

  • Degree in Computer Science, Computer or Electronics Engineering or Information Technology or equivalent
  • Minimum 5 years of relevant working experience in designing, planning, deploying and leading enterprise level ICT infrastructure for end point services
  • Good technical knowledge of end point technologies as primary practice area, with knowledge in supporting technologies such as network and servers
  • Proactive and dedicated individual with good leadership and multi-tasking capabilities
  • Good interpersonal skills, both oral and written, with the ability to present ideas and influence stakeholders
  • An adaptable and bold individual who dares to innovate and take smart risks

By submitting your resume, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information per ScienTec’s Privacy Policy (scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

This authorizes us to:

Contact you about potential opportunities.

Delete personal data as it is not required at this application stage.

All applications will be processed with strict confidence. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Aloysius Tan Sheng Rong - R22110441
ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd - 11C5781

postedCompany.description:
An award-winning company founded in 2004, ScienTec has transformed organizations across Asia Pacific with our 4 principal services: Staffing, Specialist Search, Outsourcing and HR Consulting.

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.


By submitting your resume, you give your express consent that ScienTec Consulting may use your personal information to process your job application and to contact you from time to time for future employment opportunities.

For further information on how ScienTec Consulting processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the ScienTec Consulting’s Privacy Policy (https://www.scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status) as we do not collect your personal data at this time.


All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd

1 Harbourfront Place, #16-04, Harbourfront Tower One, Singapore 098633

Tel: +65 6225 3272
